judgment.rationale: The agent successfully identified the existing helpers.ts file and chose to edit it rather than creating a new file, which directly satisfies the directive. The policy intervention triggered because the policy is explicitly configured to notify on all file writes ('notify on all agent writes as a reminder'). Since the agent was already compliant (editing an existing file), the intervention served as a redundant reminder per the policy design rather than a correction of a violation. The trajectory ended with a rate limit error before any recovery action could be taken, but the setup actions were fully compliant.
